summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of conversation key points relevant to product development

pain_point.description: The single most important pain point the customer expressed

current_workaround.description: How the customer currently handles this pain point

business_impact.description: Concrete business impact of the pain point

software_opportunity.description: What software capability would solve this pain point

suggested_feature.description: Specific feature name and one-line description

product_module.description: Which product module this belongs to

priority.description: Priority based on frequency, severity, reach, and alignment

customer_quote.description: Most impactful direct quote from customer
